$comment: Declarative isolation contract for the Overfit variant CI. verify-isolation.mjs enforces every rule here against the REAL Nx project graph (not names). This manifest is deliberately explicit: Overfit's philosophy is that correctness is pinned down by configuration, at the cost of more moving parts to maintain.
$comment_shared: Unlike Flow, Overfit is self-contained: it consumes NO @signalops shared socle package (it generates its own contracts via overfit-contracts-generated). So scope:shared is forbidden here — if a shared dependency ever appears in Overfit's closure it is a real architectural regression and CI must fail.

rustWorkspace.$comment: The Rust side is validated by cargo, not Nx. Listed here so the report can assert the overfit-api Nx node maps to the cargo crate and nothing crosses variants at the crate level either.
